languages.text: "Даже не думай". {n}Ювенна слегка качает головой.{/n} "Я не стану посвящать в свои планы того, кто присвоил себе титул мертвеца, чтобы сунуть нос в чужие секреты".

traits.locale_text: [драфт]"Даже не думай". {n}Ювенна слегка качает головой.{/n} "Я не стану посвящать в свои планы того, кто так легко присвоил себе титул мертвеца, чтобы сунуть нос в чужие секреты".
traits.speaker: JuvennaVonValancius

languages.text: "Not a chance." {n}Juvenna shakes her head slightly.{/n} "I won't be divulging my plans to someone who stole the title of a dead man so {mf|he|she} could poke {mf|his|her} nose into other people's secrets."
languages.original_text: "Даже не думай". {n}Ювенна слегка качает головой.{/n} "Я не стану посвящать в свои планы того, кто присвоил себе титул мертвеца, чтобы сунуть нос в чужие секреты".

traits.locale_text: "Not a chance." {n}Juvenna shakes her head slightly.{/n} "I won't be divulging my plans to someone who stole the title of a dead man so {mf|he|she} could poke {mf|his|her} nose into other people's secrets."

"Not a chance." {n}Juvenna shakes her head slightly.{/n} "I won't be divulging my plans to someone who stole the title of a dead man so {mf|he|she} could poke {mf|his|her} nose into other people's secrets."

"Not a chance." {n}Juvenna shakes her head slightly.{/n} "I won't be divulging my plans to someone who stole the title of a dead man so {mf|he|she} could poke {mf|his|her} nose into other people's secrets."

languages.text: «De eso nada». {n}Juvenna niega levemente con la cabeza.{/n} «No tengo intención de compartir mis planes con alguien que ha robado el título de un muerto solo para meter las narices en los secretos ajenos».
languages.original_text: "Not a chance." {n}Juvenna shakes her head slightly.{/n} "I won't be divulging my plans to someone who stole the title of a dead man so {mf|he|she} could poke {mf|his|her} nose into other people's secrets."

traits.locale_text: «De eso nada». {n}Juvenna niega levemente con la cabeza.{/n} «No tengo intención de compartir mis planes con alguien que ha robado el título de un muerto solo para meter las narices en los secretos ajenos».

languages.text: “想都别想。”{n}尤文娜微微摇了摇头。{/n}“我不会把我的计划透露给一个靠窃取死人头衔来探听别人秘密的家伙。”
languages.original_text: "Not a chance." {n}Juvenna shakes her head slightly.{/n} "I won't be divulging my plans to someone who stole the title of a dead man so {mf|he|she} could poke {mf|his|her} nose into other people's secrets."

traits.locale_text: “想都别想。”{n}尤文娜微微摇了摇头。{/n}“我不会把我的计划透露给一个靠窃取死人头衔来探听别人秘密的家伙。”

languages.text: « Hors de question, {n}rétorque Juvenna en secouant légèrement la tête.{/n} Je ne divulguerai pas mes plans à une canaille qui a usurpé le titre d'un mort pour le seul plaisir de pouvoir fourrer son nez dans les secrets des autres. »
languages.original_text: "Not a chance." {n}Juvenna shakes her head slightly.{/n} "I won't be divulging my plans to someone who stole the title of a dead man so {mf|he|she} could poke {mf|his|her} nose into other people's secrets."

traits.locale_text: « Hors de question, {n}rétorque Juvenna en secouant légèrement la tête.{/n} Je ne divulguerai pas mes plans à une canaille qui a usurpé le titre d'un mort pour le seul plaisir de pouvoir fourrer son nez dans les secrets des autres. »

languages.text: "İmkânı yok." {n}Juvenna başını hafifçe sallıyor.{/n} "Başka insanların sırlarına burnunu sokabilmek için ölü bir adamın ünvanını çalan birine planlarımı ifşa etmeyeceğim."
languages.original_text: "Not a chance." {n}Juvenna shakes her head slightly.{/n} "I won't be divulging my plans to someone who stole the title of a dead man so {mf|he|she} could poke {mf|his|her} nose into other people's secrets."

traits.locale_text: "İmkânı yok." {n}Juvenna başını hafifçe sallıyor.{/n} "Başka insanların sırlarına burnunu sokabilmek için ölü bir adamın ünvanını çalan birine planlarımı ifşa etmeyeceğim."

languages.text: "Keine Chance." {n}Juvenna schüttelt den Kopf.{/n} "Ich werde niemanden in meine Pläne einweihen, der den Titel eines toten Mannes gestohlen hat, um seine Nase in anderer Leute Angelegenheiten zu stecken."
languages.original_text: "Not a chance." {n}Juvenna shakes her head slightly.{/n} "I won't be divulging my plans to someone who stole the title of a dead man so {mf|he|she} could poke {mf|his|her} nose into other people's secrets."

traits.locale_text: "Keine Chance." {n}Juvenna schüttelt den Kopf.{/n} "Ich werde niemanden in meine Pläne einweihen, der den Titel eines toten Mannes gestohlen hat, um seine Nase in anderer Leute Angelegenheiten zu stecken."

languages.text: 「そんなことはありえないわ。」{n}ジュヴェナはわずかに首を横に振る。{/n}「死んだ男の称号を盗んでまで、{mf|彼|彼女}が他人の秘密に{mf|その|その}鼻を突っ込めるようにした者に、私の計画を明かすつもりはないわ。」
languages.original_text: "Not a chance." {n}Juvenna shakes her head slightly.{/n} "I won't be divulging my plans to someone who stole the title of a dead man so {mf|he|she} could poke {mf|his|her} nose into other people's secrets."

traits.locale_text: 「そんなことはありえないわ。」{n}ジュヴェナはわずかに首を横に振る。{/n}「死んだ男の称号を盗んでまで、{mf|彼|彼女}が他人の秘密に{mf|その|その}鼻を突っ込めるようにした者に、私の計画を明かすつもりはないわ。」
